content: I will view `tool_detail_screen.dart` from line 295 to 335 to see the current location-fetching flow for the "Yakındaki Camiler" tool. The `position` variable might retain the old location from `getLastKnownPosition()`, preventing the manual fallback from triggering correctly. This explains the user's reported issue.
